subcodes.first_line: The Beloved of the worlds dwelleth within the Most Great Prison; recognize thou, even as He hath recognized, the worth of this wronged state [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: محبوب عالمیان در سجن اعظم ساکنست و قدر این مظلومیت را دانسته تو هم بدان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @knowledge; recognition of God
